basic_details.job_title: NII Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Immunology (NII) has released the official Project Assistant Recruitment Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NII Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding an M.Sc. or M.Tech in Immunology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Life Sciences, Microbiology, or any other related field of Life Sciences are eligible to apply online on or before 27 July 2026. Shortlisted candidates will attend the walk-in interview on 28 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc/ M.Tech in Immunology/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Life Sciences/ Microbiology or any other related field of Life Sciences from recognized university.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: M.Sc/ M.Tech in Immunology/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Life Sciences/ Microbiology or any other related field of Life Sciences from a recognized university.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NII Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NII to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NII Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NII Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NII Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: M.Sc/ M.Tech in Immunology/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Life Sciences/ Microbiology or any other related field of Life Sciences from a recognized university.

content_sections.heading: NII Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NII Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NII to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NII Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NII Project Assistant position is 27th July 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc/M.Tech degree in Immunology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Life Sciences, Microbiology, or a related field from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month, along with an additional 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for NII Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the NII Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NII Project Assistant recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position in the National Institute of Immunology.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this NII recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Project Assistant at NII is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant position will be conducted online on 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state can apply for this position, provided they meet the specified eligibility criteria and qualification requirements.
